classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为零部件右视图外形与安装结构尺寸，包含可见尺寸标注'53'、'36.4'、'17.6'、'5'及直径'Ø75'，用于表达外形宽度、局部间距和法兰直径等机械几何尺寸；未出现针脚功能或性能曲线。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR missed diameter symbol; visible callout is diameter 75.

terminology_notes: Diameter symbol normalized to Φ for OCR text 75 where the visible callout shows Φ75.

dimension_records.reason: Visible vertical dimension at upper right indicates a local offset/spacing; exact feature name is not specified in the cropped view.
Dimension line spans the inner central mounting/interface width in the right view.
Dimension line spans the intermediate width around the upper mounting structure.
Outer dimension line spans the full upper width of the right view.
Visible diameter symbol with 75 marks the circular/outer envelope diameter on the right side view.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Mounting/interface widths include 17.6 mm inner spacing and 36.4 mm intermediate spacing; upper overall width is 53 mm.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Not specified in this cropped right-view OCR evidence.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Outer diameter/envelope is Φ75 mm; local upper-right offset/spacing is 5 mm.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Not specified in this cropped right-view OCR evidence.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No unresolved OCR items from the provided source boxes.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区在完整标注源图的蓝色框内，显示电机或部件外形、线缆与连接器位置，并包含'73'、'50'、'138.5'、'98'、'M12*1'、'Ø15'、'Ø6.4'、'200'等尺寸和螺纹标注，以及线缆固定和弯曲半径说明；未出现针脚功能、线色或接线表，因此最符合机械尺寸类。

title.title_zh: 线缆连接器机械尺寸图

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected diameter symbol omitted by OCR from visible callout.
Corrected OCR text CABLEFORC to visible connector brand text CABLEFORCE.
Corrected diameter symbol omitted by OCR from visible callout.
Used full-line OCR result and ignored overlapping fragment OCR boxes.

terminology_notes: Diameter symbol Φ restored where visible diameter callouts were recognized without the symbol by OCR.
Connector thread M12*1 normalized semantically as M12×1 while preserving original callout.
translation_notes: Secure at least 100mm translated as a minimum cable securing requirement.
Cable allowable bending radius R50mm translated as allowable cable bend radius R50 mm.

Diameter callout on the connector end.
Thread specification printed beside the connector.
Left vertical dimension spans the main body portion below the upper reference line.
Visible text is a connector brand label, retained as non-dimensional connector information.
Diameter callout attached to the cable section.
Horizontal dimension under the cable run from outlet reference to connector reference.
Installation note specifying minimum securing distance for the cable.
